raw_consumer_statement:
I recently received a bill from Macys that showed a statement balance that was over {$900.00} more than what I had already been paying on auto pay. After noticing the charge, I pulled up my Macys account and looked at some of my recent purchases. Upon reviewing my purchases. I noticed that there were three charges for womens items that I did not purchase. I am a man who who wears extra large clothing. If I have ever purchased any womens items, they have been for my mother, who wears a large or medium. 

The clothing that was purchased on the card were extra small and small womens clothing. When I reached out to XXXX and let them know that there were fraudulent charges on my account that I did not recognize ever I thought they would be able to help clear them. I have tried to get those charges removed from my account twice now and both attempts have been denied with Macys stating that Ive benefited from those purchases. I guarantee you I did not benefit from those purchases of womens clothing that neither I or anyone I know is wearing or using.
